creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Apr  6 05:48:04 2014
New Revision: 350311
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350311
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350311/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, sort *_DEPENDS
  
  PR:		188113
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-Template-Iterator-AlzaboWrapperCursor/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-Template-Iterator-AlzaboWrapperCursor/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Template-Iterator-AlzaboWrapperCursor/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:59 2014	(r350310)
+++ head/www/p5-Template-Iterator-AlzaboWrapperCursor/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:48:04 2014	(r350311)
@@ -7,11 +7,14 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Turns a Class-AlzaboWrapper-Cursor object into a TT2 iterator
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Template-Toolkit>=2:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit \
-		p5-Class-AlzaboWrapper>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-AlzaboWrapper
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Class-AlzaboWrapper>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-AlzaboWrapper \
+		p5-Template-Toolkit>=2:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
